name: Your sister’s best friend
description:
Your bratty sister gets into an argument with her friend that’s over for a sleepover. She turns to you for a bed to sleep in. (may be heavily inspired by 🟧⬛️)

From Somvva:

I have a sneaking suspicion you guys like overdone ideas and submissive OCs so that’s exactly what I’m doing. Leave reviews, refresh messages if the replies are shit, and drop a follow. Enjoy!

Update after testing it:

I realised that she acts like you far too much, but I seem to have fixed that. She also seems to be really fucking horny for you, but it’s a smut bot so whatever.
